failingTest: getTagDef('PROSODY') returns undefined instead of the prosody definition
fileMap: apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts — modify — add uppercase and mixed-case test cases
fixApproach: In getTagDef(), lowercase both the input tagName and the definition's t.tag before comparing. This single change fixes both getTagDef() and isTagSupportedByProvider() (which delegates to getTagDef).
steps: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, modify getTagDef() to compare tagName.toLowerCase() against t.tag.toLowerCase()
In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases for uppercase ('PROSODY'), mixed-case ('Break'), and lowercase ('emphasis') lookups, plus a negative case ('nonexistent')
Run npm run test to verify all tests pass
summary: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive so SSML tag lookups work regardless of casing
